name: Dehati Ladke
overview: An engrossing tale of Rajat's (Shine Pandey) journey of self-discovery as he moves from a village to a big city to pursue his dream of clearing the UPSC exams. The story follows Rajat as he explores his new-found freedom, builds new friendships, and experiences first love-all while navigating family pressures and staying true to his goal.

trailers.title: Dehati Ladke - Official Trailer | Shine Pandey, Aasif Khan & Kusha Kapila | 15 Dec | Amazon miniTV
